bundles.title: Add Mainline Handoff Question Blocks
bundles.goal: Add AskUserQuestion blocks to the three mainline terminal handoffs while preserving the existing prose guidance.

tasks.title: Add an AskUserQuestion block to specflow step 9 for the spec_ready handoff with /specflow.design and /specflow.reject targets.
Add an AskUserQuestion block to specflow.design step 4 for the design_ready handoff with /specflow.apply and /specflow.reject targets.
Add an AskUserQuestion block to specflow.apply step 2 for the apply_ready handoff with /specflow.approve, /specflow.fix_apply, and /specflow.reject targets.

bundles.title: Align OpenSpec Change Artifacts
bundles.goal: Ensure the change spec and task checklist encode the new handoff contract and required manual verification steps.

tasks.title: Tighten the slash-command-guides change delta so mainline terminal handoffs require AskUserQuestion blocks and the correct slash-command target sets, with review-loop and utility exemptions preserved.
Update tasks.md to track build, structural test, snapshot, openspec validation, and non-automated Claude Code UI verification work for this change.

bundles.title: Regenerate Distributed Command Guides
bundles.goal: Rebuild the generated slash-command guides so the distributed artifacts include the new handoff blocks.

tasks.title: Run the standard build pipeline to regenerate the three distributed command guides from the updated templates.
Inspect the regenerated guides to confirm each terminal handoff contains an AskUserQuestion block with the expected slash-command targets.

bundles.title: Extend Structural Regression Coverage
bundles.goal: Update structural tests and snapshots so regressions in mainline handoff question blocks are caught automatically.

tasks.title: Extend command-order.test.ts with ordered fragments for AskUserQuestion and each required slash-command target in the three generated guides.
Regenerate the affected snapshot files for specflow.md, specflow.design.md, and specflow.apply.md.
Run the relevant structural and snapshot tests to verify the new coverage passes against the regenerated output.

bundles.title: Run End-to-End Verification
bundles.goal: Validate the change, observe the Claude Code UI behavior directly, and close out the change checklist.
outputs: verification: Claude Code buttons observed at spec_ready, design_ready, and apply_ready

tasks.title: Run openspec validate ensure-askquestion-coverage-for-all-phase-transitions --type change and resolve any remaining contract drift.
Run the full test suite and confirm the change is green end-to-end.
Manually drive spec_ready, design_ready, and apply_ready in Claude Code and confirm clickable buttons appear at each handoff.
Mark the change tasks complete in tasks.md, including the manual verification outcome.
